---

Create free Google Tag Manager account
Add new container for each of your websites
Configure container and account settings
Install Tag Manager snippet on your websites
After setting up Analytics, add all Conversion tags
Add any advertising tracking tags (Google, FB, etc)
TAG MANAGER SETUP
Create free Google Analytics account
Add new property for each of your websites
Configure property and account settings
Set up all desired Events and Conversions
In Tag Manager add Conversion Tracking tag
In Tag Manager and add all Conversions tags
GOOGLE ANALYTICS SETUP
Create a sheet for each type of statistics
Add a row for each statistic being tracked
Add a column for each time increment tracked
Create equations for any calculated statistics
Build charts and line graphs to show trends
GOOGLE SHEET SETUP (BASIC)
Create free Google Data Studio account
Decide on most important dashboards
Create list of all stats to pull into dashboard
Integrate all needed sources of data
Design dashboards with data and charts
Build out any needed data computations
DATA STUDIO SETUP (ADVANCED)
